title: Advanced LIGO Noise Sources Explained
desc: Analyzes quantum, thermal, and technical noise components in gravitational wave detectors.

title: Deriving Dyson Series and On-Shell Factorization
desc: Step-by-step derivation of Dyson series for transition amplitudes and on-shell factorization theorem.

title: Massless Amplitudes and Spinor-Helicity Formalism
desc: Exploring 3-point amplitudes and spinor-helicity variables for massless spinning particles.

title: Spinor Helicity for Massless Amplitudes
desc: Explains spinor helicity formalism using Lorentz group decomposition and spinors.

title: Quantum Step Potential and Probability Conservation
desc: Analyzing reflection and transmission coefficients for a step potential, proving probability conservation.

title: Quantum Mechanics Symmetry and Conservation
desc: Analyzes angular momentum conservation and proves the Feynman-Hellmann theorem.

title: Statistical Mechanics: 2D Gas Distributions
desc: Derives velocity and rate distributions for 2D ideal gases and relative molecular speeds.

title: On-Shell Factorization in Quantum Field Theory
desc: Explores Green functions, poles, and factorization in scattering amplitudes.

title: Killing Vectors in Schwarzschild Metric
desc: Proving time and azimuthal symmetries as Killing vectors using Christoffel symbols.

title: General Relativity Homework Problem Analysis
desc: Calculating Christoffel symbols and Ricci tensor for a time-dependent metric.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework Solutions
desc: Proofs for operator properties and uncertainty relations in quantum mechanics.

title: Statistical Mechanics: Most Probable Distributions
desc: Calculates equilibrium distributions for classical, bosonic, and fermionic particles.

title: Solving Physics Integrals and Tensor Proofs
desc: Step-by-step solutions for quantum field theory and electromagnetism exercises.

title: Proving Lorentz Invariance and Optical Theorem
desc: Demonstrates Lorentz invariance of inner product and derives optical theorem from S-matrix unitarity.

title: Scattering Theory Principles and Axioms
desc: Explores scattering amplitude constraints, Hilbert space axioms, and Fock space definitions in quantum theory.

title: Statistical Mechanics Homework: Normalization and Particle Classification
desc: Normalizing a probability distribution and classifying particles as bosons or fermions based on spin.

title: Advanced Calculus: Taylor's Theorem Review
desc: Explores Taylor's Theorem with Peano, Lagrange, and Cauchy remainder forms for function approximation.

title: Advanced Calculus Series Convergence Analysis
desc: Analyzing convergence of six complex series using comparison, ratio, and root tests.

title: Advanced Calculus Surface and Curve Integrals
desc: Solutions for surface integrals, Stokes' theorem, and complex line integrals in multivariable calculus.

title: Power Series Convergence and Summation
desc: Analyzing convergence domains and proving summation formulas for ln(1+x) and arctan(x).

title: Advanced Calculus: Metrics and Inequalities
desc: Proving metric properties and Cauchy-Schwarz inequality in function spaces.

title: Advanced Calculus Homework on Minima and Closed Sets
desc: Proving existence of minima for continuous functions and properties of the unit circle.

title: Advanced Calculus Partial Derivative Exercises
desc: A collection of partial derivative problems with solutions in advanced calculus.

title: Implicit Function Theorem in Advanced Calculus
desc: Proving existence and computing derivatives of an implicit function from a cubic equation.

title: Advanced Calculus Critical Points Analysis
desc: Finding and classifying critical points of multivariable functions using partial derivatives.

title: Advanced Calculus Integration Problems
desc: Solving area and volume integrals using coordinate transformations and Jacobians.

title: Advanced Calculus: Surface Area and Centroids
desc: Calculating surface areas and centroids using double integrals and parameterization.

title: Complex Analysis Homework Problems and Proofs
desc: Proofs and formulas for complex functions and trigonometric expansions.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Residue Theorem Applications
desc: Solving integrals using the residue theorem with detailed step-by-step calculations.

title: Complex Analysis: Residue Theorem Applications
desc: Using the residue theorem to evaluate improper integrals with branch cuts.
